name: GHRP-2
subtitle: Growth Hormone Releasing Peptide-2 | Pralmorelin
overview: GHRP-2 is a synthetic growth hormone secretagogue that stimulates the pituitary gland to release growth hormone. It is one of the most potent members of the GHRP family, being 2-3 times more effective than GHRP-6 in stimulating GH release. Originally developed as a diagnostic agent for growth hormone deficiency, it works by mimicking ghrelin and binding to the GHS-R1a receptor.
mechanism: GHRP-2 acts as a synthetic agonist of ghrelin, binding to the growth hormone secretagogue receptor (GHS-R1a) in the hypothalamus and pituitary. This stimulates cAMP production and promotes pulsatile release of endogenous growth hormone without suppressing natural feedback loops. It works synergistically with GHRH to amplify GH secretion beyond what either peptide achieves alone.
keyBenefits: Potent stimulation of natural growth hormone release
Improved body composition and fat metabolism
Increased appetite (can be beneficial for bulking)
Maintains natural GH pulsatile release patterns
Synergistic effects when combined with GHRH peptides

items.name: GH Deficiency Assessment
items.description: Used as a diagnostic agent in Japan for assessing growth hormone deficiency in clinical settings.

items.name: Natural GH Stimulation
items.description: Stimulates endogenous growth hormone release through ghrelin receptor activation.

items.name: IGF-1 Elevation
items.description: Indirectly increases IGF-1 levels through enhanced GH secretion.

items.name: Muscle Growth
items.description: Enhanced muscle protein synthesis through elevated growth hormone and IGF-1 levels.

items.name: Fat Metabolism
items.description: Improved lipolysis and body composition through GH-mediated fat oxidation.

items.name: Recovery Enhancement
items.description: Faster recovery from exercise and improved sleep quality.

items.name: Muscle Protection
items.description: Myoprotective effects in muscle atrophy models through GHS-R1a stimulation.

items.name: Cardioprotection
items.description: Cytoprotective effects observed in cardiac tissue research.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection is the primary administration route. Best administered on an empty stomach for optimal GH release. Multiple daily doses recommended to maintain elevated GH levels.

steps: Clean work area and hands thoroughly
Inject slowly down vial side (not directly onto powder)
Store in refrigerator, use within 28 days

keyBenefits: Administer on empty stomach (2+ hours after eating)
Wait 20-30 minutes before eating after injection
Best timing: morning, post-workout, and before bed
Avoid fats and carbs around administration for best GH release

interactions.notes: Powerful synergy; GHRH + GHRP combination amplifies GH release significantly.
Classic GHRP + GHRH stack for enhanced growth hormone release.
Both are GHRPs; can be alternated but typically not stacked together.
Similar mechanism; GHRP-2 is more potent with less appetite stimulation.
No known negative interactions; different mechanisms.

timeline.effects: GH spike within 15-30 minutes of injection
Noticeable improvements in energy and well-being
Visible changes in body composition and muscle fullness
Full benefits realized with consistent use

stopSigns: Unusual swelling in hands or feet
contraindications: Active cancer or history of cancer

references.title: Growth Hormone Releasing Peptide-2 increases food intake in healthy men
references.keyFindings: GHRP-2 infusion increased food intake by 35.9% compared to saline, demonstrating ghrelin-like orexigenic effects.

references.title: Synthetic Growth Hormone-Releasing Peptides: Cytoprotective Effects
references.keyFindings: GHRPs including GHRP-2 demonstrated significant cytoprotective effects in cardiac and extracardiac tissues.

references.title: GHRP-2 effects on growth hormone release in swine
references.keyFindings: Chronic GHRP-2 administration increased average daily gain by 22.35% and feed efficiency by 20.64%.
